3036530.name: Tint The Saver
3036530.description: In the distant future, as endangered species proliferate, humanity has developed a revolutionary camera. You assume the role of researcher "Tint," the first subject in an experimental mission to restore endangered species on a remote Pacific island. In this story-driven survival simulation game, you must explore the island, gather wood, eat apples, and collect water in a bottle to stay alive. Your goal is to use the camera to capture images of the island's endangered species and collect data to restore them. But be warned—if you fail to survive, it's game over. Survive to the end, restore all endangered species, and uncover the island's secrets.
